title: Land shrimp
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''land shrimp''' was a creature that lived on [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]] and [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], and considered by many to be a delicacy.

In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the Kashyyyk land shrimp was on the menu at the [[Manarai]] resturant visited by [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]].

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]''
*{{JournalCite|15|The Great Herdship Heist}}
